text: I feel a sense of openness and possibility in the first image, with its minimalist, modern space inviting contemplation. The soft lighting and absence of people make me feel calm, perhaps even a bit small amidst such emptiness. In the second image, I am drawn in by a lively, colorful wall covered with words and screens about research and development. Here, curiosity stirs within me; I am eager to engage with these ideas and reflect on the evolving interaction between humans and technology. The contrast between the two spaces makes me reflect on solitude versus engagement, presence versus participation.
